name: social-video-downloader
title: Social Video Downloader - YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, X, Facebook
description: Extract video download URLs and metadata from 5 platforms: YouTube (including Shorts), TikTok, Twitter/X, Instagram Reels, and Facebook. Bulk processing, full metadata (title, author, thumbnail, duration). No API keys required. Free alternative to yt-dlp cloud wrappers and commercial video APIs.
